title: bangdiv

messages.description: subsequent bangs until divisor value is hit

methods.description: resets the counter to the start value

body: [bangdiv] outputs bangs when receiving bangs by sorting them based on a corresponding divisor value. The first bang in the count is output to the left outlet, while subsequent bangs are sent to the right outlet until the divisor value is hit, starting the cycle again. A starting value lets you start in the middle of a count. If the start value is negative, it adds that many counts to the first time a bang is output.
